title: Yosys seems to be inconsistent with the original design.

features.name: string literal in ternary expression
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with a string literal concatenation on one branch and a bit slice on the other branch

features.name: large hex concatenation assignment
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of multiple signals assigned from a large multi-bit hex literal

features.name: hex-based variable bit select bounds
features.description: Code should include variable bit select operations using hex notation for bounds
